result.reasoning: The tool call history provides the audio file duration as 426.86 seconds. To answer "How long is the attached audio file?" in minutes rounded to the nearest integer, I convert seconds to minutes by dividing by 60: 426.86 ÷ 60 ≈ 7.1143 minutes. Rounding 7.1143 to the nearest integer gives 7 minutes. The final answer is a numeric value, so no casing adjustment is needed.
